findings.issue: Screenshot is captured but never used in the API request payload
findings.suggestion: Remove screenshot capture or include img_base64 in the payload if vision analysis is needed
findings.est_impact: Saves ~50KB per channel scan × 16 channels = unnecessary bandwidth/memory

findings.issue: API response error handling missing—if /see returns invalid JSON or empty reply, no fallback exists
findings.suggestion: Add try-except around res.json() and provide default error message instead of uncaught exception
findings.est_impact: Monitor crash if Jarvis API returns malformed response

findings.issue: Alert filtering uses uppercase string matching on result, but result parsing depends on case-sensitive line prefixes
findings.suggestion: Normalize case once at start: result = result.upper(), then parse lines consistently
findings.est_impact: Mixed-case responses may pass filter but fail rating detection, silently dropping alerts
